title: Weak Authentication Mechanism
description: The system lacks details regarding its authentication mechanisms. Without knowing the specific protocols, MFA implementation, or password policies, attackers could potentially impersonate legitimate users through brute-force attacks, credential stuffing, or phishing campaigns. The absence of strong authentication significantly increases the risk of unauthorized access.
attack_vector: Brute-force attacks, credential stuffing, phishing, weak password policies, lack of MFA.
mitigations: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Enforce strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation).
Utilize a robust authentication service with rate limiting and account lockout mechanisms.
